decision_claim: Stronger live host-capability claims require fresh recovery evidence plus canonical capability-surface fields. Historical certification and wording refreshes alone must not upgrade the current live-host posture.

required_signals: host_feedback_summary and claim surfaces agree on the same stronger posture

allowed_when: product naming, examples, or host-family wording becomes clearer
no new canonical surface field is introduced
no new recovery threshold is required
no current live-host claim becomes stronger
must_not_do: promote degraded host posture to ready/native_attach

open_followup_when: a new host family needs an additional canonical surface field or invariant
official docs materially change approval, sandbox, MCP, continuity, or export assumptions
repeated target-run evidence shows the current capability declaration is insufficient
a stronger claim would require new machine checks beyond the current policy

required_doc_refs.contains: GAP-167 Post-Recovery Activation Trigger And Claim Upgrade Gate

rollback_ref: git revert the host capability claim-upgrade policy, its verifier, related tests, host-capability docs alignment, backlog status updates, and closeout evidence
